description: A tabpanel section displaying university course entry requirements, including A-level grades, qualification alternatives list, optional mature students link, and optional other requirements.

stories.name: Standard
stories.description: Standard offer panel with grades, qualification alternatives, mature students link, and other requirements

props.gradesContext: including Maths and a science or technology subject

qualifications.term: A Levels + a fourth Level 3 qualification
qualifications.description: AAB, including Maths and a science or technology subject + A in a relevant EPQ
36, with 6 in Higher Level Maths and a science
DDD in Engineering or Applied Science + A in A Level Maths
DD in Engineering or Applied Science + A in A Level Maths
Distinction in the relevant T Level, including grade A in the core component + A in A Level Maths
AAABB + AA in Maths and a science
A + AA in Maths and a science or technology subject
Award of the Access to HE Diploma in a relevant subject, with 45 credits at Level 3, including 39 at Distinction and 6 at Merit + A in A Level Maths

otherRequirements: Science and technology subjects include Biology/Human Biology, Chemistry, Computer Science, Electronics, Environmental Science, Further Maths, Physics and Design & Technology

stories.name: AccessSheffield
stories.description: Access Sheffield offer panel with reduced grade requirements

props.gradesContext: including Maths and Physics + pass in the practical element of any science A Levels taken

qualifications.term: A Levels + a fourth Level 3 qualification
qualifications.description: ABB, including Maths and Physics + B in a relevant EPQ
33, with 5 in Higher Level Maths and Physics
ABBBB + AB in Maths and Physics
B + AB in Maths and Physics
Award of the Access to HE Diploma in Science, with 45 credits at Level 3, including 30 at Distinction and 15 at Merit

stories.name: NoAccess
stories.description: Panel for courses with no Access Sheffield offer, uses course-ereq-panel--no-access modifier

props.gradesContext: BBB (any A Level); BBC including Maths and at least one of Physics, Chemistry or Biology

qualifications.description: 32; 31, with Maths and at least one of Physics, Chemistry or Biology at Higher Level 5 or Standard Level 7
DDD in Engineering or Applied Science + GCSE Science grade 6/B and Maths grade 7/A
AABBB (any subjects); ABBBB, including Maths and at least one of Physics, Chemistry or Biology

otherRequirements: If you are studying both Maths and at least one of Physics, Chemistry or Biology at A Level, there are no additional GCSE requirements.

notes: The variant prop maps to a CSS class on the root: 'standard' adds class 'standard', 'access_sheffield' adds class 'access_sheffield', 'no-access' adds class 'course-ereq-panel--no-access'. The root section always has role='tabpanel'. The .offer-headers span has class 'printonly' (print-only visibility). The .inline-description-list is a dl element; when hasColon is true it gets the 'inline-description-list--has-colon' modifier. In the no-access variant the dl does not use the inline-description-list classes and instead uses .course-ereq-panel__qualification-name strong elements inside dt tags — model this via the hasColon=false prop and children for freeform content if needed. The matureStudentsContent and otherRequirements props are optional; otherRequirements renders as a ul with .otherreqstext divs inside li elements.
